frontmatter.title: Magic Kingdom
frontmatter.description: Photos and videos from our day at Magic Kingdom — Cinderella Castle, the fireworks, and the moments that made the whole trip worth it.

photos.alt: Family in matching Disney 2026 shirts on the ferry heading to Magic Kingdom
photos.caption: The whole crew on the ferry — matching shirts and ready to go.

photos.alt: Family smiling on the ferry in matching Disney 2026 shirts
photos.caption: Matching shirts, matching excitement.

photos.alt: Large family group on the ferry in matching Disney 2026 shirts
photos.caption: The whole family, all in, on the ride over.

photos.alt: Family posing on the ferry with kids and stroller
photos.caption: Even the littlest ones were along for the ride.

photos.alt: A smiling girl wearing Minnie ears stands on a Disney ferry deck with water and resort buildings in the background
photos.caption: Minnie ears and a big smile on the ferry ride over.

photos.alt: Close-up group photo of family members in matching white Disney shirts standing on a covered ferry deck
photos.caption: A tighter shot on the ferry — the whole crew together.

photos.alt: Young boy walking up to meet Mickey Mouse in his meet-and-greet room
photos.caption: Walking up to meet Mickey for the first time.

photos.alt: Mickey Mouse giving a young boy a big hug during meet and greet
photos.caption: That hug — worth every minute in line.

photos.alt: Mickey Mouse high-fiving a young boy during meet and greet
photos.caption: A high-five from Mickey himself.

photos.alt: Young boy in a stroller holding a Mickey cup with a blue Mickey balloon beside him on Main Street
photos.caption: Main Street, a Mickey balloon, and the biggest smile — that's the day right there.

photos.alt: Young boy smiling in a stroller with a blue Walt Disney World Mickey balloon
photos.caption: That Mickey balloon was the prize of the day.

photos.alt: A young child sits in a stroller at Magic Kingdom holding a Mickey cup, with a clear blue Mickey balloon floating beside them
photos.caption: Balloon in hand, snack in reach — this kid had the day figured out.

photos.alt: Crowds walk down Main Street U.S.A. toward Cinderella Castle under a cloudy blue sky, with colorful Mickey balloons visible on the right
photos.caption: Walking down Main Street toward the castle — the view that never gets old.

photos.alt: A family group in matching white Disney shirts poses in front of Cinderella Castle on a sunny day, with a blue Mickey balloon, stroller, and wheelchair in the foreground
photos.caption: The whole group in front of the castle — 11 of us, all matching, all smiling.

photos.alt: A smaller family group in matching white Disney shirts poses near Cinderella Castle on a sunny day, with a blue Mickey balloon and stroller beside them
photos.caption: A tighter group shot by the castle — the Florida sun was blazing.

photos.alt: Young child in a stroller holding a vanilla soft-serve ice cream cone at Magic Kingdom
photos.caption: Soft-serve on a hot Florida day — the ultimate park survival move.

photos.alt: Close-up of child eating vanilla ice cream cone in stroller
photos.caption: Ice cream makes everything better, especially in the Florida heat.

photos.alt: Young girl with Minnie ears and a first-visit button holding an ice cream sundae
photos.caption: First visit button and a sundae — she was living her best life.

photos.alt: A boy stands in a shaded Disney park area eating an ice cream treat, with Fantasyland-style buildings and crowds in the background
photos.caption: Ice cream break in the shade — a necessary stop in the Florida heat.

photos.alt: Family selfie near Dumbo and Storybook Circus with blue canopy and sunny sky
photos.caption: Storybook Circus — sunny, hot, and exactly where we wanted to be.

photos.alt: Family selfie in matching Disney shirts under the blue canopy at Storybook Circus
photos.caption: Matching shirts, matching smiles.

photos.alt: Family selfie near Dumbo area with circus tent flags in the background
photos.caption: Circus flags and blue skies — the Dumbo area was a perfect midday stop.

photos.alt: Kids in matching Disney shirts riding the Buzz Lightyear Space Ranger Spin
photos.caption: Space Ranger Spin — everyone in matching shirts and ready to blast some Zurgs.

photos.alt: Adults in matching Disney Family shirts on Buzz Lightyear ride loading area
photos.caption: Even the grown-ups got in on the Space Ranger action.

photos.alt: Family in Buzz Lightyear ride vehicle with a Cast Member nearby
photos.caption: The whole crew on Buzz Lightyear — not a single Zurg was safe.

photos.alt: Close-up of kids in Buzz Lightyear ride vehicles with laser blaster controls
photos.caption: Laser blasters locked and loaded.

photos.alt: Inside the Monsters Inc Laugh Floor theater with the show on screen
photos.caption: Monsters, Inc. Laugh Floor — the interactive comedy show that had everyone cracking up.

photos.alt: Laugh Floor stage with pink star projections and a monster character on screen
photos.caption: The monsters really do have the best jokes.

photos.alt: Laugh Floor audience with guest in sparkly Mickey ears watching the show
photos.caption: Interactive and hilarious — the whole theater was in on it.

photos.alt: Mike Wazowski on the Laugh Floor side screen
photos.caption: Mike Wazowski making an appearance, naturally.

photos.alt: Laugh Floor performance screen with a monster character on stage
photos.caption: The Laugh Floor — one of those attractions that sneaks up on you and becomes a favorite.

photos.alt: Fireworks bursting over Cinderella Castle with colorful projection mapping
photos.caption: Happily Ever After — fireworks erupting over Cinderella Castle with projection mapping painting the castle in color.

photos.alt: Cinderella Castle lit with colorful blue, gold, and red projections during a nighttime fireworks show, with gold fireworks exploding overhead and crowds silhouetted in front
photos.caption: The castle lit up in blue, gold, and red — with golden fireworks lighting up the entire sky above.

photos.alt: Golden willow fireworks cascading over Cinderella Castle
photos.caption: The golden willow effect raining down over the castle — one of the most breathtaking moments of the show.

photos.alt: Fireworks arcing from both sides of Cinderella Castle with colorful projections
photos.caption: Fireworks launching from both sides of the castle while the projections shifted through every color.

photos.alt: Dramatic golden canopy of fireworks hanging over Cinderella Castle
photos.caption: A golden canopy of fireworks hanging over the castle — the whole sky lit up at once.

photos.alt: Large circular golden firework bursting above Cinderella Castle
photos.caption: One of the big bursts — a massive golden chrysanthemum exploding above the castle.

photos.alt: Crowd gathered watching the nighttime show at Magic Kingdom
photos.caption: The crowd packed in, everyone facing the castle, waiting for the show to unfold.

photos.alt: Close view of fireworks over Cinderella Castle with Mickey-ear silhouettes in the foreground
photos.caption: Fireworks lighting up the sky with Mickey-ear silhouettes in the crowd in front of us.

photos.alt: Final golden cascade of fireworks over Cinderella Castle
photos.caption: The finale — golden fireworks raining down over the castle as the show reached its peak.

videos.alt: Cinderella Castle lit in blue and purple projections as the nighttime show begins
Golden fireworks bursting over Cinderella Castle during Happily Ever After
Fireworks over Cinderella Castle during Happily Ever After
Fireworks firing from both sides of Cinderella Castle with colorful projections
Cinderella Castle lit in warm projection colors during the nighttime show
Sparkling fireworks over Cinderella Castle with blue and orange projections
Cinderella Castle glowing blue and teal with fireworks smoke in the sky
Riding through an indoor attraction at Magic Kingdom
